nasb.text: The words of a whisperer are like dainty morsels, And they go down into the innermost parts of the body.

esv.text: The words of a whisperer are like delicious morsels; they go down into the inner parts of the body.

cnv.text: 搬弄是非的人的言語如同美食； 深入人的臟腑。

ccb.text: 闲言闲语如可口的美食， 轻易进入人的五脏六腑。

csbs.text: 传谣者的话语，如同可口的食物， 下到人的脏腑。
